evals.fixed: Changed port field from required to optional (matches default behavior in step 4c). Fixed 'would' to 'requires' in duplicate-ports edge case rationale.
Fixed second 'would' to 'masks' in no-services-key edge case rationale. Scanned for remaining voice violations — none found.

Precision: defined binary names, PATH resolution, and --config flag invocation interface. Invariant 1: reformulated from postcondition to always-true lifecycle property. Edge cases: added port-already-in-use, SIGTERM cleanup failure (best-effort), and concurrent launch (exclusive file creation). Added WARN log level for cleanup failures. Clarified health checks run concurrently.

Precision: clarified shutdown timeout as aggregate wall-clock deadline, not per-process. Made signal-all-then-wait pattern explicit in steps. Edge cases: added concurrent stop invocations (harmless, no locking needed), process exit code irrelevant (stop cares about process absence, not exit status). Clarified termination order is not significant.
